scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @projection-mapping/shared && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @projection-mapping/api" "npm run dev --workspace @projection-mapping/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @projection-mapping/shared && npm run build --workspace @projection-mapping/api && npm run build --workspace @projection-mapping/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @projection-mapping/shared && npm run test --workspace @projection-mapping/shared && npm run test --workspace @projection-mapping/api && npm run test --workspace @projection-mapping/web
